reforms.description: The Austrian government implemented a series of fiscal measures, including the abolition of the investment tax and an increase in public investment, to stimulate domestic demand and support economic recovery.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are expected to boost domestic demand and investment, leading to higher economic growth and improved business conditions.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures were enacted to provide a considerable boost to domestic demand.
reforms.importance_rationale: The abolition of the investment tax and increased public investment represent significant structural changes aimed at revitalizing the economy, with potential long-term impacts on growth.
reforms.source_quote: The abolition of the investment tax and higher public investment expenditure have provided a considerable boost to domestic demand.
